requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial
Banks - Climate Finance and Management of Climate Change Risks) Directions,
2025.
requirements.object: Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Climate Finance and Management of Climate Change Risks) Directions, 2025

requirements.full_sentence: These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
requirements.object: immediate effect

requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be applicable to Commercial Banks (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank').
requirements.object: Banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')

requirements.full_sentence:
In these Directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall
bear the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) 'green activities / projects' means activities / projects meeting the
requirements prescribed in paragraph 14 of these Directions;
requirements.object: to them below: (1) 'green activities / projects' means activities / projects meeting the requirements prescribed in paragra
by a bank for a fixed period and the proceeds of which are earmarked for allocation towards green finance

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) 'green finance' means lending to and / or investing in green activities /
projects meeting the requirements prescribed in paragraph 14 of these
Directions.
requirements.object: or investing in green activities / projects meeting the requirements prescribed in paragraph 14 of these Directions

requirements.full_sentence:
(4) 'greenwashing' means the practice of marketing products / services as green,
when in fact they do not meet requirements to be defined as green activities /
projects.
requirements.object: products / services as green

requirements.full_sentence:
All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as
have been assigned to them under the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934 or the
Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or any statutory modification or re-enactment thereto,
or Glossary of terms published by the RBI or as used in commercial parlance, as the
case may be.
requirements.object: as have been assigned to them under the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934 or the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or any statutory mod

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank desirous of raising green deposits shall put in place comprehensive
Board-approved policies on Green Deposits and Financing Framework, the coverage
of which are indicated in paragraph 8 and paragraph 11 respectively of these
Directions.
requirements.object: Board-approved policies on Green Deposits and Financing Framework, the coverage of which are indicated in paragraph 8 and p

requirements.full_sentence:
The Board shall be responsible for reviewing the bank's green deposit
initiatives through a review report to be placed in accordance with the provisions
specified in paragraph 19 of these Directions.
requirements.object: the bank's green deposit initiatives through a review report to be placed in accordance with the provisions specified in

requirements.full_sentence:
The Board-approved policy on green deposits of a bank shall lay down all
aspects, in detail, for the issuance and allocation of green deposits.
requirements.object: in detail, for the issuance and allocation of green deposits

requirements.full_sentence:
A copy of the
policy on 'Green Deposits' shall be made available on the website of the bank.
requirements.object: the website of the bank

requirements.full_sentence:
A
foreign bank having a common global policy on green deposits may use the same for
issuance of green deposits in India.
requirements.object: issuance of green deposits in India

requirements.full_sentence:
In such cases, the foreign bank shall make
available the green deposit policy on its website.
requirements.object: deposit policy on its website

requirements.full_sentence: A bank shall issue green deposits as cumulative / non-cumulative deposits.
requirements.object: cumulative / non-cumulative deposits

requirements.full_sentence:
On maturity, the green deposits shall be renewed or withdrawn at the option of the
depositor.
requirements.object: at the option of the depositor

requirements.full_sentence:
The green deposits shall only be denominated in Indian Rupees and not in
any foreign currency.
requirements.object: Indian Rupees and not in any foreign currency

requirements.full_sentence:
The tenor, size, interest rate, and other terms and conditions
as defined in the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Interest Rate on
Deposits) Directions, 2025, as amended from time to time, shall also be applicable to
green deposits mutatis mutandis.
requirements.object: green deposits mutatis mutandis

requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation:
(1) It is not mandatory for a bank to raise green deposits, but in case it intends to
raise green deposits from their customers they should follow the framework
prescribed herein.
requirements.object: herein

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) A bank shall pay interest on green deposits to its customers as per agreed
terms and conditions and aforesaid directions irrespective of allocation /
utilisation of proceeds.
requirements.object: deposits to its customers as per agreed terms and conditions and aforesaid directions irrespective of allocation / utilisation o

requirements.full_sentence:
(4) With respect to premature withdrawal of green deposits, while there is no
restriction, a bank shall adhere to the aforesaid directions.
requirements.object: directions

requirements.full_sentence:
The third-party verification / assurance report shall, at the minimum, cover the
following aspects:
(1) Use of the proceeds by the bank should be in accordance with the eligible
green activities / projects.
requirements.object: cover the following aspects: (1) Use of the proceeds by the bank should be in accordance with the eligible green activities / projec

requirements.full_sentence:
It shall monitor the end-use of funds allocated
against the deposits raised.
requirements.object: funds allocated against the deposits raised

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall, with the assistance of external firms, assess annually the impact
associated of the funds lent for or invested in green finance activities / projects
during a financial year through an Impact Assessment Report.
requirements.object: of external firms, assess annually the impact associated of the funds lent for or invested in green finance activities / project

requirements.full_sentence:
The Directions,
instructions, and guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these Directions shall
continue to remain repealed.

Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been
taken, or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
requirements.object: by the provisions thereof

requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed
by these Directions.
requirements.object: by these Directions
affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

requirements.full_sentence:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be
imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
requirements.object: enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in
derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for
the time being in force.
requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in
order to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
<image>
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any
provision of these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
